title: Team thinking, visualized by Claude
summary: Anthropic's Claude was used by the Williams F1 Team to visualize the thinking patterns of drivers and pit crew under race pressure. Neural activity and cognitive data were processed by Claude and translated into visual designs displayed on helmets, race suits, and garage displays at the Monaco Grand Prix.
